title: astelma retartum
intro: Astelma retartum, also known as Mexican Mastich or Mexican Mastich tree, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Astelma retartum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
